description: List of persons, headed by R. Nahray (Nahray), on the payroll of the community. Goitein says: scholars on the payroll of the Cairene commuity. Similar to Bodl. MS heb. c 28/6 (PGPID 547) (App. B 12) and T-S K15.70 (PGPID 1337) (App. B 13), both ed. Mann, Jews, II, 246-247. (Information from Mediterranean Society II, 441, App. B 14).
description_he: רשימת אנשים בראשות ר' נהראי, על משכורת הקהילה, חכמים בקהיר
